query:
INSERT OR IGNORE INTO reaction_rules (
                        id, name, reaction_type, category, reactant_classes, 
                        conditions_favored, conditions_inhibited, byproducts, 
                        hazards, kb_probability_modifier, mechanism_summary, "references"
                    ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
